assembly_context.name: Modern_Square_Table_Assembly
assembly_context.summary: 设计一个现代简约四腿方桌装配体。包含1个矩形桌面、4根相同的方形截面桌腿、1个整体式矩形横梁框架。桌腿通过面贴合与同心配合固定在桌面下方，横梁框架位于桌腿内侧底部附近，通过面贴合与同心配合连接桌腿，形成稳定结构。
design_rules: Units are in mm for dimensions, convert to meters for API calls if necessary.
Use coincident constraints for face mating and concentric constraints for axis alignment.
Table legs are positioned at the four corners of the tabletop underside.
Cross beam frame is centered under the table, connecting the inner faces of the legs.

instances.name: Cross Beam Frame Instance
instances.placement_notes: Centered under table. Located at Z = -620mm (100mm from ground, assuming leg height 720mm and table thickness 25mm, ground is at Z=-720). Actually, if table top bottom is Z=0, legs go down to Z=-720. Ground is Z=-720. Beam is 100mm from ground, so Beam Z position is -620.

assembly_sequence: Mate inst_leg_fl top_face to inst_table_top_1 bottom_face
Mate inst_leg_fr top_face to inst_table_top_1 bottom_face
Mate inst_leg_bl top_face to inst_table_top_1 bottom_face
Mate inst_leg_br top_face to inst_table_top_1 bottom_face
Mate inst_cross_beam_1 end_face_x_minus to inst_leg_fl inner_face_x_plus
Mate inst_cross_beam_1 end_face_x_plus to inst_leg_fr inner_face_x_minus
Mate inst_cross_beam_1 end_face_y_minus to inst_leg_fl inner_face_y_plus
Mate inst_cross_beam_1 end_face_y_plus to inst_leg_bl inner_face_y_minus

part.name: Cross Beam Frame
part.shape: Rectangular frame made of 30mm x 30mm square tubes. Outer dimensions approx 1120mm x 520mm (accounting for leg positions). Height 30mm.
part.material_or_notes: Metal or wood. Welded or joined frame.

faces.name: end_face_x_minus
faces.purpose: Mates with front-left and back-left leg inner faces

faces.name: end_face_x_plus
faces.purpose: Mates with front-right and back-right leg inner faces

faces.name: end_face_y_minus
faces.purpose: Mates with front-left and front-right leg inner faces

faces.name: end_face_y_plus
faces.purpose: Mates with back-left and back-right leg inner faces

axes.name: axis_x_center
axes.purpose: Horizontal axis along length for alignment

axes.name: axis_y_center
axes.purpose: Horizontal axis along width for alignment

assembly_relation_notes: Located 100mm above ground (approx 620mm below table top).
End faces mate with inner faces of table legs.
standalone_modeling_instructions: Create a sketch on the XY plane.
Draw outer rectangle 1120mm x 520mm centered at origin.
Offset inward by 30mm to create inner boundary.
Extrude boss 30mm in +Z direction to form the frame shape.
Alternatively, model as four separate beams and combine, but single part is preferred for simplicity if geometry allows.
